data.content: Pushed c3e0b315 to origin/main. Refined the single dispatch-level Swap Agent presentation so it reads as a dispatch-wide replacement tool instead of a per-step affordance, updated pools guidance/README copy to point back to that one shared control, and refreshed the layout regression test. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
